footerDescription: Stay updated for workshops, jam sessions, and ticket releases.
travelDescription: Choose the route that works best for you. We will keep this section updated as venue details are confirmed.
faqDescription: Frequently asked questions about the festival experience.

travelSections.title: Public Transport
travelSections.description: Use regional trains, buses, or local shuttles where available. Detailed station and connection notes will be shared before the festival.

travelSections.title: Car
travelSections.description: If you arrive by car, please consider carpooling and follow the on-site parking guidance from the festival team.

travelSections.title: Camper
travelSections.description: Camper information will be announced closer to the event, including arrival windows and overnight parking rules.

supportDescription: If you would like to support us, every donation helps us keep participation accessible and inclusive. Your contribution directly supports safer spaces, workshop materials, and community-led programming.
venueDescription: By the Seferihisar coast in a natural amphitheater. Map is embedded below.
partnersDescription: Supporters and collaborators of the festival.
note: Ticket sales are managed on Pretix.
termsDescription: Privacy and policy documents will be available here soon.
heroLead: FLINTA+ is an acronym that stands for Frauen (women), Lesben (lesbians), Inter*, Nichtbinär (non-binary), Trans, and Agender. It’s primarily used in Germany. The asterisk (*) is sometimes added to highlight that this is not an exhaustive list and that the term includes all gender identities and expressions that are not cisgender men
contactDescription: Reach out for partnerships, accessibility requests, or ticket support.

faqs.question: Is there a camping area?
faqs.answer: Yes, a supervised camping area is located next to the festival grounds.

faqs.question: Food & drink options
faqs.answer: Aside from the delicious breakfast included with your ticket, we also offer freshly cooked vegetarian lunches for just €10. You’re also welcome to use our fully equipped kitchen whenever you like.
